steps.t: Mablung is awaiting your return in Echad Taerdim, the Ranger camp in Cirith Ungol. You should report to Mablung when you are able.
Celeborn and the Rangers have set up a small staging camp inside Torech Ungol. You should find the camp and report to Celeborn.
The time has come to enter the Remmorchant. You should enter the Remmorchant with a raid group ready via the Instance Finder panel.
The chieftain of the Ungoledain blocks your path deeper into the Remmorchant. You should defeat Bratha Tasakh, Lady of Many Venoms.
Bratha Tasakh and her Ungoledain have been defeated. You should press further into the Remmorchant.
Thossulun and the Queensbrood have fallen, finally stemming the tide of spiders and gredbyg. You should press further into the Remmorchant.
The time has come to face Shelob within the Remmorchant. You should defeat Shelob.
Shelob has been defeated at last. You should talk to Celeborn.
